'''CX-133 Chaos fighter''' was a [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] model used during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:DisregardAerodynamics-TOTJTSW2.jpg|thumb|left|100px|Chaos fighter rear.]]

The CX-133 was developed and mass produced by [[Koros Spaceworks]] as a cheap, light-weight fighter.
Capable of ramming attacks combined with swarm tactics, the volatile fuel and munitions storage was capable of rendering massive damage to any potential target.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==History==
These fighters were often carried on board [[Supremacy-class attack ship|''Supremacy''-class attack ships]].<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" /> In the [[Battle of Koros Major]], the CX-133 were used to make [[Ramming/Legends|suicide attacks]] on the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]], seriously damaging the [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] ''[[Reliance I]]''.<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" /> In the [[Battle of Empress Teta|Second Battle of Empress Teta]], they defended [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] against an [[Onderon warbeast transport]] and four [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] one-man fighters which assaulted the [[Iron Citadel/Legends|Iron Citadel]] of the Krath in an attempt to rescue [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]].<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" /> During the [[Battle of Foerost (Great Sith War)|Battle of Foerost]], they were used in the attack on the [[Foerost Shipyards]].<ref name="TOTJ:TSW">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]]</ref>
